title: Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited:
Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited!
